## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare and refine the Knowledge Base feature for an upcoming investor pitch to Sapphire.](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Knowledge Base is nearly demo-ready, with impressive progress made in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [UI polish and data integration are the main focus areas before the pitch](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [A new "killer feature" visualization is needed to showcase the power of the Knowledge Base](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [The team will prioritize connecting real data and enhancing the dashboard's UX](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Pitch Context and Strategy

  - [Marcel has been meeting with potential Series B investors](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Sapphire meeting scheduled for Friday, earlier than expected](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Focusing on investors who are less intrusive and allow autonomy](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Pitch narrative: AI disruption → content strategy → GrowthX's approach → Knowledge Base](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Knowledge Base Overview

  - [Purpose: Enable research and fact-checking workflows to access private data](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Acts as a cache to avoid redundant external API calls (e.g., ESA, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Implements LightRAG for efficient indexing and context assembly](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Current features: entity relationships, graph visualization, query capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### UI Development Progress

  - [Dashboard with mock data showcasing various metrics and visualizations](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Graph view displaying entity relationships and connections](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Need for a more opinionated dashboard highlighting key metrics](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Plan to integrate existing UI components (e.g., table, filters) from other parts of the app](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### Next Steps for Development

  - [Pedro: Merge current progress into main branch, connect real data to UI](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Gianpiero: Polish UI, implement top 3 key metrics section, enhance overall design](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Both: Collaborate on creating a new "killer feature" visualization](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Discuss and implement entity list view with search and detailed information](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Utilize Inertia.js for smoother page transitions and partial reloads](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Implement sortable tables with pagination](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Enhance filter functionality using existing components](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pedro to merge current progress into the main branch (auto-merge in 10 minutes)](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
  - [Gianpiero to familiarize himself with the Knowledge Base codebase over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
  - [Schedule a sync meeting on Monday to align on priorities and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)
  - [Implement UI polish and data integration throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=2915.0)
  - [Brainstorm and develop a new standout feature for the investor demo](https://fathom.video/share/p5tsbH1Ty_H3PrcyQzn3XEzwRyfkthKM?tab=summary&timestamp=2960.0)
